expectations.evidence: File is at outputs/PM-001-pricing-404-on-listed-skus.md with PM-001 prefix
Contains Summary, Timeline, Symptom, Root Cause, Fix Applied, Impact, Lessons Learned, and Prevention sections
Symptom section: 'the pricing endpoint returned a 404' and 'GET /api/skus/{id}/pricing -> 404 Not Found'
Root Cause section: 'PricingEngine.setInitialPrice() existed but was never invoked from any code path. No event listener or service call connected the SKU-listed transition to pricing initialization'

Root Cause explains 'No event listener bridged SkuStateChanged to the pricing module' and details the 5-whys: 'No listener written? The two modules were implemented in separate feature requests without an explicit integration contract'
